8tdc6utj5us6av9qj4pgdnri48.summary: You face rising friction and workload concerns across the team—driven by data migration transitions and a lack of clear leadership guidance. Resourcing remains a critical pain point—the backfills for Matt Unsworth and Deepak are currently unresolved and marked as TBD. You must address the reality of teammates leaving without backfills—forcing tactical reassignments as the team operates under the assumption that these vacant roles will not be filled anytime soon.
tasks: Address the unresolved TBD status of the Matt Unsworth and Deepak backfills with Claire to establish clear hiring timelines.
Detail the specific tactical reassignments forced by the current lack of backfills to highlight the operational strain on remaining team members.
Report the growing friction and workload concerns surrounding the new data pipelines and source system migrations.
Request explicit leadership guidance on the NART process and Pilot application transitions to alleviate team confusion.
8tdc6utj5us6av9qj4pgdnri48.title: Monthly 1:1 w/Claire Veitenheimer | Mark Francis

mfpj6c3e65dtvjdkk7vp7a3aq0.summary: Analyze the friction surrounding ServiceNow—specifically the paused RFP, the commercial hold by Dan Griffiths, and the pricing risk of the 13,000-assist limit. Compare the bundled ServiceNow capabilities against overlapping alternatives like Flowable, Solonis, Celonis, and homegrown event-monitoring tools to avoid vendor lock-in. Address the unresolved architectural debate—particularly the choice between out-of-the-box vendor UIs and embedded desktop widgets—before you commit to the demo.
tasks: Reconcile the paused ServiceNow RFP with Dan Griffiths—securing clarity on his direct feedback before the June 10th meeting.
Audit the overlapping capabilities of Flowable and Solonis—evaluating these bundled vendor solutions against your homegrown event-monitoring tools.
Establish a strict governance process for 'Assist' token usage—mitigating the risk of the 13,000-assist cap during note summarization.
Resolve the UI standoff between the CTO organization and business teams—choosing between AWS out-of-the-box setups and embedded widgets.
mfpj6c3e65dtvjdkk7vp7a3aq0.title: Integrated BPM Solution - Claims Demo

9h35j8a7gen770a5em0oatlhao.summary: Review the critical updates from your June 4 weekly staff meeting—specifically the shifting of technical decision-making to Integration Architects, stalled backfills for Matt Unsworth and Deepak, and ongoing friction around data migration pipelines. Address the mounting organizational tensions—specifically the AWS desktop integration paths and the contentious Agent Assist UI options—before meeting with Mike. Align on the paused ServiceNow RFP strategy—notably the token optimization issue—to protect the budget prior to your upcoming leadership presentations.
tasks: Brief Mike on the resource constraints resulting from the frozen Matt Unsworth and Deepak backfills.
Establish a clear RACI matrix for the Integration Architects to manage technical decision-making gaps.
Resolve the architectural conflict between the out-of-the-box AWS UI and custom homegrown solutions.
Align on the ServiceNow pricing model and token governance strategy prior to the June 10 meeting with Dan.
9h35j8a7gen770a5em0oatlhao.title: Bi-weekly 1:1 w/Mike Wilkins | Mark Francis

ba92rfm44iihb38gb63cb51hl0.summary: Your analyzed work notes contain no explicit mentions of Sai or action items from Ray—requiring a pivot to other high-priority architectural items during this sync. You must address critical organizational pain points—specifically the Integration Architect capacity constraints and the architectural friction surrounding the AWS Agent Assist UI integration. Prepare to brief Sai on these unresolved platform issues—including the ServiceNow pricing risks—to ensure alignment before key leadership readouts.
tasks: Establish the Integration Architect RACI matrix—addressing capacity and skill gaps—to stabilize technical decision-making.
Resolve the AWS Agent Assist UI path dispute—advocating for the embedded widget—to clarify the timeline and prevent rumors about decommissioning Conversant.
Review the ServiceNow token pricing risks—specifically the 13,000 assist ceiling—before resuming stalled commercial discussions.
Confirm the backfill status for Deepak and Matt Unsworth—currently flagged as TBD—to finalize resource reassignments.
ba92rfm44iihb38gb63cb51hl0.title: Monthly Architecture Sync with Sai | Mark Francis
